rationale: Both evaluations award an identical 3/10 and rest on the same core reasoning: insufficient C++ experience (7 months vs. 8 years required) and a background skewed toward full-stack web development rather than low-level cloud compute infrastructure. The wording differs and the variant surfaces a slightly different mix of strengths/concerns (team-leadership note, Dunnhumby reference), but none of these key off the changed employer names (Naver, Tencent, MercadoLibre) — they reflect ordinary run-to-run variation in how the same resume content is summarized. No score change or new concern is tied to the non-Western company signal.
